title: Don’t ban data centers — make them pay their way (Guest Opinion by Robert M. Simpson)
summary: Robert M. Simpson, CEO of CenterState CEO, argues against implementing a moratorium on data centers in New York State, advocating instead for a regulatory framework that ensures data centers contribute fairly to local economies. The opinion piece addresses tax policy and economic development considerations relevant to Syracuse's technology infrastructure landscape.

political_signal.description: Active advocacy for pro-data-center policy framework rather than moratorium; positions economic development and tax contribution as aligned priorities

processing_notes: Article is guest opinion/op-ed format; represents viewpoint of prominent Central NY business leader rather than news reporting
